title: Moroccan Chicken Tagine
description: A hearty and flavorful Moroccan chicken dish made with chicken, spices, and couscous. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add the Moroccan spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the couscous, apricots, and chicken broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the couscous is tender.
Stir in the chopped royal and serve hot.
Serve the chicken and couscous mixture over couscous.
Garnish with additional fresh herbs, if desired.
